fix: Public listings, All Ads, category pages, latest ads and direct UUID ad routes
root_causes_fixed: The React /search All Ads page used the empty bundled Ht array instead of live ads.
Server public queries required status=approved with exact lowercase casing.
Server public queries required a created_at cutoff in PostgREST, causing total failure on schema variations.
Direct UUID ad fallback repeated the brittle exact-status query.
A successful but empty public API response did not try the browser Supabase fallback.
UUID category IDs were not consistently resolved to parent/subcategory slugs in browser fallback data.
Listings were deduplicated by title/location/price instead of database ID.
Public detail endpoint could serve stale CDN responses.
